name: Orange Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add orange peel. Stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
3. Combine water and orange juice; add to the creamed mixture alternately with dry ingredients, beating well after each addition.
4. Fold in egg whites.
5. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 8 x 1 1/2-inch round baking pans.
6. Bake at 375°F until done, about 30 minutes.
7. Cool for 5 minutes; remove from pans.
8. When cool, spread Orange Filling on one layer.
9. Top with remaining layer.
10. Frost with Orange Buttercream Frosting.
ORANGE FILLING:
1. In a saucepan, combine 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 1 1/2 teaspoons grated orange peel, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
2. Gradually blend in 3/4 cup orange juice, 1/4 cup water, and 2 slightly beaten egg yolks.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat; stir in 2 tablespoons butter until melted.
5. Cool.
